## What and why

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? Link any issue. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / experiment
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Refactor / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes and `uv run ruff check` is clean.
- [ ] New parameters live in a config and are justified in
      [`docs/METHODOLOGY.md`](../docs/METHODOLOGY.md) (no magic numbers).
- [ ] New references are verified and annotated in
      [`docs/literature-review.md`](../docs/literature-review.md).
- [ ] Paper still builds (`cd docs/tex && tectonic main.tex`) if `tex/` changed.
- [ ] [`docs/ROADMAP.md`](../docs/ROADMAP.md) /
      [`CHANGELOG.md`](../CHANGELOG.md) updated if status moved.
